about.label: About Bethrh
about.title: A Smart Incubator for Ambitious Entrepreneurs

features.score: Bethrh scores every idea out of 100

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.platform_a: Bethrh is a 12-week business accelerator platform built for Syrian entrepreneurs everywhere.
faq.stages_a: Bethrh uses 5 stages: Idea, Validation, Build, Launch, and Growth.
faq.add_idea_q: How do I add a project idea?
faq.add_idea_a: Go to My Ideas and click New Idea.
faq.value_q: What is a value proposition and how do I craft one?
faq.validation_q: What is validation and how do I track it?
faq.score_q: How does the idea scoring system work?
faq.coach_q: Who is the AI Coach in Bethrh?
faq.coach_a: The AI Coach is your specialized advisory companion for the Syrian market.
faq.privacy_q: Is my data private and secure?
faq.privacy_a: Yes. Bethrh uses Supabase with Row Level Security enabled on all tables.

footer.tagline: The business accelerator platform for inspired founders — we turn ideas into real projects.
